subcodes.title: Words to Mason Remey around Sept. 1911
subcodes.first_line: Bahá'u'lláh is the root, I am the Branch. The root of the tree does not bear fruit. The fruit is found upon the branches.
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
